mapper.select:
select count(1) from stu_info
and ( stu_no like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or stu_name like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') )
mapper.insert: insert into stu_info (stu_no, stu_name, gender, age, class_name, height, weight, score) values (#{stuNo}, #{stuName}, #{gender}, #{age}, #{className}, #{height}, #{weight}, #{score})
mapper.update: update stu_info set stu_name = #{stuName}, gender = #{gender}, age = #{age}, class_name = #{className}, height = #{height}, weight = #{weight}, score = #{score} where stu_no = #{stuNo}
